channel.title: AI Press Review — Social Feed (EN+FR)
channel.description: Merged bilingual feed for LinkedIn distribution. Each item carries LinkedIn-ready copy — short summary, listen link, hashtags.

item.title: OpenAI's "Spud" Model & Compute Crunch — Apr 14
item.description:
OpenAI's "Spud" Model & Compute Crunch — Apr 14
Today's review highlights OpenAI's upcoming "Spud" model, promising significant product improvements, amidst a growing industry-wide compute shortage impacting AI development and deployment.
Listen — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-14.html
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Japan's AI Alliance: Can Industry Beat Giants? — Apr 13
item.description:
Japan's AI Alliance: Can Industry Beat Giants? — Apr 13
Japan's top industrial and financial firms are uniting with SoftBank to build a sovereign AI foundation, reducing reliance on US and Chinese models.
Listen — https://podcast.aequitus.net/episodes/2026-04-13.html
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing

item.title: Gemma 4 vs. Agent Limits: On-Device Power Meets Real-World Gaps — Apr 13
item.description:
Gemma 4 vs. Agent Limits: On-Device Power Meets Real-World Gaps — Apr 13
Google's Gemma 4 brings powerful, private agentic AI to phones with full on-device processing, while new research reveals that agent skills often fail under real conditions.
Listen — https://podcast.aequitus.net
#AI #Podcast #TechBriefing
